arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُسْلِمٌ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ، قَالَ اسْتُصْغِرْتُ أَنَا وَابْنُ، عُمَرَ‏.‏

english.text: I and Ibn `Umar were considered too young to take part in the battle of Badr.

chapter.english: Military Expeditions led by the Prophet (pbuh) (Al-Maghaazi)
